routes.documentation: Check the health status of the application server.
Registers a new user and returns JWT tokens.
Logs in an existing user and returns JWT access & refresh tokens.
Get a new JWT access token using a valid refresh token.
Logs out the authenticated user.
Retrieve the profile details of the authenticated user.

responses.body:
{
  "user": {
    "UserID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "Email": "{{faker 'internet.email'}}",
    "PasswordHash": "",
    "FirstName": "{{faker 'person.firstName'}}",
    "LastName": "{{faker 'person.lastName'}}",
    "CurrentPhaseID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "TotalLifetimePoints": {{faker 'number.int' max=5000}},
    "CurrentPhasePoints": {{faker 'number.int' max=1000}},
    "MissionStreak": {{faker 'number.int' max=10}},
    "ArrivalDate": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
    "JobStartDate": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}",
    "CreatedAt": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
    "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
  },
  "profile": {
    "ProfileID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "UserID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "PhoneNumber": "{{faker 'phone.number'}}",
    "Bio": "{{faker 'lorem.sentence'}}",
    "AvatarURL": "{{faker 'image.avatar'}}",
    "RadarVisibility": "Show_Anonymous",
    "Lat": {{faker 'location.latitude' min=40.0 max=41.0}},
    "Lng": {{faker 'location.longitude' min=-74.0 max=-73.0}},
    "LocationUpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}",
    "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
  },
  "credit_score": {
    "CreditID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "UserID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "CurrentScore": {{faker 'number.int' min=300 max=850}},
    "LastUpdated": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
  }
}
responses.label: Profile Retrieval Success

routes.documentation: Update the profile details of the authenticated user.
Retrieve all available missions for the user.

responses.body:
[
  {{#repeat 3}}
  {
    "UserMissionID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "UserID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "MissionID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "Status": "{{oneOf (array 'Not_Started' 'In_Progress' 'Pending_Verification' 'Completed' 'Overdue')}}",
    "CalculatedDueDate": "{{faker 'date.future'}}",
    "ProofURL": "{{faker 'internet.url'}}",
    "ProofSubmittedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}",
    "VerifiedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}",
    "VerifiedBy": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "BasePointsEarned": {{faker 'number.int' min=50 max=200}},
    "SpeedBonusPoints": {{faker 'number.int' min=0 max=50}},
    "StreakBonusPoints": {{faker 'number.int' min=0 max=50}},
    "FirstCompleterBonusPoints": {{faker 'number.int' min=0 max=100}},
    "TotalPointsEarned": {{faker 'number.int' min=50 max=400}},
    "RewardedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}",
    "CreatedAt": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
    "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
  }
  {{/repeat}}
]
responses.label: List Missions Success

routes.documentation: Get detailed view of a specific mission, including its sub-tasks.

responses.body:
{
  "mission": {
    "MissionID": "{{urlParam 'id'}}",
    "PhaseID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "Title": "{{faker 'lorem.words' min=2 max=4}}",
    "Description": "{{faker 'lorem.sentence'}}",
    "Location": "{{faker 'location.city'}}, {{faker 'location.state'}}",
    "BasePoints": {{faker 'number.int' min=50 max=200}},
    "IsMandatory": {{faker 'datatype.boolean'}},
    "VerificationType": "Upload",
    "DueDateType": "Relative",
    "FixedDueDate": null,
    "RelativeTriggerEvent": "arrival_date",
    "RelativeDaysOffset": {{faker 'number.int' min=5 max=30}},
    "CreatedAt": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
    "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
  },
  "user_mission": {
    "UserMissionID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "UserID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "MissionID": "{{urlParam 'id'}}",
    "Status": "In_Progress",
    "CalculatedDueDate": "{{faker 'date.future'}}",
    "ProofURL": "",
    "ProofSubmittedAt": null,
    "VerifiedAt": null,
    "VerifiedBy": "",
    "BasePointsEarned": 0,
    "SpeedBonusPoints": 0,
    "StreakBonusPoints": 0,
    "FirstCompleterBonusPoints": 0,
    "TotalPointsEarned": 0,
    "RewardedAt": null,
    "CreatedAt": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
    "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
  },
  "tasks": [
    {{#repeat 3}}
    {
      "TaskID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
      "MissionID": "{{urlParam 'id'}}",
      "Title": "{{faker 'lorem.sentence'}}",
      "Description": "{{faker 'lorem.sentence'}}",
      "CreatedAt": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
      "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
    }
    {{/repeat}}
  ],
  "user_tasks": [
    {{#repeat 3}}
    {
      "UserTaskID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
      "UserID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
      "TaskID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
      "UserMissionID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
      "IsCompleted": {{faker 'datatype.boolean'}},
      "CompletedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}",
      "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
    }
    {{/repeat}}
  ]
}
responses.label: Mission Detail Success

routes.documentation: Submit a proof file to request verification for a mission.
Check/uncheck a sub-task belonging to an active mission.
List all standard phase templates in the journey.

responses.body:
[
  {
    "PhaseID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "PhaseNumber": 1,
    "Title": "Pre-Arrival & Preparation",
    "Description": "Secure documents, visa application, housing prep",
    "CreatedAt": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
    "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
  },
  {
    "PhaseID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "PhaseNumber": 2,
    "Title": "First 30 Days Settling In",
    "Description": "SSN application, bank account setup, SEVIS check-in",
    "CreatedAt": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
    "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
  },
  {
    "PhaseID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "PhaseNumber": 3,
    "Title": "Mid-Program Community Integration",
    "Description": "Cultural exchange events, local community activities",
    "CreatedAt": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
    "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
  }
]
responses.label: Journey Phases List

routes.documentation: Try to transition to the next phase in the J1 journey if criteria are met.
Get phase history and records of the authenticated user.
Get user leaderboard entries.
List badges unlocked by the authenticated user.
List the credit score history records for the user.
Send a friendship invitation request to another user.
List inbound pending friendship requests.
Accept or reject an inbound friendship invitation.
List all friends for the user.
Remove an existing friendship relation.
Check the radar for nearby users/friends sharing geolocation details.
List all expense transactions involving the authenticated user.
Create a new group expense transaction and specify target user splits.
Get detailed view of a specific expense transaction along with splits detail.

responses.label: Expense Detail

routes.documentation: Delete an expense created by the user.
List pending expense splits that the user owes money for.
Submit a payment receipt/slip for a specific split to mark it as paid.
Approve the payment slip submitted by a split debtor.
Retrieve notifications list for the authenticated user.
Mark a specific notification as read.
Mark all notifications for the current user as read.
Remove/delete a specific notification.
List jobs with optional filters.

responses.body:
[
  {{#repeat 5}}
  {
    "JobID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "AgencyName": "{{oneOf (array 'InterExchange' 'CIEE' 'Alliance Abroad' 'Intrax')}}",
    "EmployerTitle": "{{faker 'company.name'}}",
    "Position": "{{oneOf (array 'Lifeguard' 'Ride Operator' 'Sales Associate' 'Housekeeper' 'Food Service')}}",
    "PositionType": "Seasonal",
    "LocationCity": "{{faker 'location.city'}}",
    "LocationState": "{{faker 'location.state' abst=true}}",
    "GroupLocation": "{{faker 'location.city'} Area",
    "USSponsor": {{faker 'datatype.boolean'}},
    "SalaryRangeMin": {{faker 'number.float' min=12 max=16 fractionDigits=2}},
    "SalaryRangeMax": {{faker 'number.float' min=17 max=22 fractionDigits=2}},
    "AvailableSlots": {{faker 'number.int' min=1 max=10}},
    "Description": "{{faker 'lorem.paragraph'}}",
    "SourceURL": "{{faker 'internet.url'}}",
    "ScrapeAt": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
    "PostedAt": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
    "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
  }
  {{/repeat}}
]
responses.label: List Jobs

routes.documentation: Get complete detailed info of a job including housing options and overall rating.

responses.body:
{
  "job": {
    "JobID": "{{urlParam 'id'}}",
    "AgencyName": "{{oneOf (array 'InterExchange' 'CIEE' 'Alliance Abroad' 'Intrax')}}",
    "EmployerTitle": "{{faker 'company.name'}}",
    "Position": "{{oneOf (array 'Lifeguard' 'Ride Operator' 'Sales Associate' 'Housekeeper' 'Food Service')}}",
    "PositionType": "Seasonal",
    "LocationCity": "{{faker 'location.city'}}",
    "LocationState": "{{faker 'location.state' abst=true}}",
    "GroupLocation": "{{faker 'location.city'}} Area",
    "USSponsor": {{faker 'datatype.boolean'}},
    "SalaryRangeMin": {{faker 'number.float' min=12 max=16 fractionDigits=2}},
    "SalaryRangeMax": {{faker 'number.float' min=17 max=22 fractionDigits=2}},
    "AvailableSlots": {{faker 'number.int' min=1 max=10}},
    "Description": "{{faker 'lorem.paragraph'}}",
    "SourceURL": "{{faker 'internet.url'}}",
    "ScrapeAt": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
    "PostedAt": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
    "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
  },
  "housing": [
    {
      "HousingID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
      "JobID": "{{urlParam 'id'}}",
      "Description": "{{faker 'lorem.sentence'}}",
      "WeeklyRate": {{faker 'number.float' min=75 max=150 fractionDigits=2}},
      "Deposit": {{faker 'number.float' min=150 max=300 fractionDigits=2}},
      "Transportation": "Walking/Biking",
      "RangeMinStartDate": "{{faker 'date.future'}}",
      "RangeMaxStartDate": "{{faker 'date.future'}}",
      "CreatedAt": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
      "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
    }
  ],
  "rating": {
    "RatingSummaryID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "JobID": "{{urlParam 'id'}}",
    "OverallRate": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.5 max=5 fractionDigits=1}},
    "AgencyRate": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.5 max=5 fractionDigits=1}},
    "JobRate": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.5 max=5 fractionDigits=1}},
    "CoworkersRate": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.5 max=5 fractionDigits=1}},
    "TownRate": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.5 max=5 fractionDigits=1}},
    "HoursRate": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.5 max=5 fractionDigits=1}},
    "HousingRate": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.5 max=5 fractionDigits=1}},
    "SecondJobFeasibilityRate": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.5 max=5 fractionDigits=1}},
    "OvertimeAvailabilityRate": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.5 max=5 fractionDigits=1}},
    "ReviewCount": {{faker 'number.int' min=5 max=50}},
    "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
  }
}
responses.label: Job Detail

routes.documentation: Add a job option to the user's wishlist cart.
List all job offers currently wishlisted in the user's cart.
Remove a job offer from the wishlist cart.
Write and publish a review and rating for a specific job experience.
List reviews. Can optionally be filtered by job_id.

responses.body:
[
  {{#repeat 3}}
  {
    "ReviewID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "JobID": "{{#if (queryParam 'job_id')}}{{queryParam 'job_id'}}{{else}}{{faker 'string.uuid'}}{{/if}}",
    "UserID": "{{faker 'string.uuid'}}",
    "RatingStars": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.0 max=5.0 fractionDigits=1}},
    "ReviewText": "{{faker 'lorem.paragraph'}}",
    "TipsForNextGeneration": "{{faker 'lorem.sentence'}}",
    "ScoreAgency": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.0 max=5.0 fractionDigits=1}},
    "ScoreJob": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.0 max=5.0 fractionDigits=1}},
    "ScoreCoworkers": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.0 max=5.0 fractionDigits=1}},
    "ScoreTown": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.0 max=5.0 fractionDigits=1}},
    "ScoreHours": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.0 max=5.0 fractionDigits=1}},
    "ScoreHousing": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.0 max=5.0 fractionDigits=1}},
    "ScoreSecondJobFeasibility": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.0 max=5.0 fractionDigits=1}},
    "ScoreOvertimeAvailability": {{faker 'number.float' min=3.0 max=5.0 fractionDigits=1}},
    "CreatedAt": "{{faker 'date.past'}}",
    "UpdatedAt": "{{faker 'date.anytime'}}"
  }
  {{/repeat}}
]
responses.label: Reviews List
